iot1click.project.placementtemplate.Defa.Description: The default attributes (key-value pairs) to be applied to all placements using this template.

iot1click.project.placementtemplate.Devi.Description: An object specifying the [DeviceTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-1-click/latest/projects-apireference/API_DeviceTemplate.html) for all placements using this ([PlacementTemplate](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-1-click/latest/projects-apireference/API_PlacementTemplate.html)) template.
